name: Planet Diving Suit (7th)

unlock: Found in a crate in Eidos 7.

unlock: Found in a crate north of the Solar Tower in the Wasteland.

name: Holiday Rabbit

name: Cyber Magician

name: Sporty Yellow
unlock: Complete Life of the Scavengers and defeat the Brute in the Forbidden Area.

name: La Vie En Rose
unlock: Reward for the Recruit Passcode Specialists bulletin-board task.

unlock: Found in a train car in Matrix 11.

unlock: Found in a crate in Matrix 11.

name: Daily Force
unlock: Found in a crate in Matrix 11.

name: Fluffy Bear

name: Daily Sailor

name: Sky Ace
unlock: Reward for completing the Encounter side mission.

name: Black Wave

name: Photogenic
